image.stylePrompt: fantasy tactical RPG ability icon, centered single emblem, high contrast silhouette, crisp readable shape at small size, polished game UI art, dramatic lighting, clean composition, no text, no letters, no words, no watermark, no UI frame, no collage
image.negativePrompt: text, letters, words, typography, logo, watermark, signature, border, frame, clutter, busy scene, multiple subjects, realistic photo, low contrast, blurry details
